bio: Archmaester Timotty is an Archmaester of the Citadel and the author of Conjectures, where he suggests that Aegon_I_Targaryen spared Sunspear during the "Dragon's Wroth" in the First Dornish War hoping that the Dornishmen would turn on House Martell for not falling prey to dragonfire..

name: Timotty Snow
bio: Timotty Snow, known as the Bastard of Flint's Finger, was a member of House Flint of Flint's Finger. Timotty accompanied Lord Cregan_Stark south to King's Landing during the Dance of the Dragons. After war's end, Timotty and Hallis_Hornwood founded the Wolf Pack, a free company which sailed from Westeros for the Free Cities.

name: Tion Frey
bio: Tion Frey is the third son of Ser Emmon_Frey and Genna_Lannister.

name: Tion Lannister
bio: Tion Lannister was a knight of House Lannister. He was the second son of Lord Gerold_Lannister and Lady Rohanne_Webber, and the twin brother of Tywald_Lannister. Tion was the second-born son of Gerold_Lannister, Lord of Casterly Rock, and Lady Rohanne_Webber, his second wife. He became the heir to Casterly Rock after his older twin brother, Tywald_Lannister, died in the Peake Uprising in 233 AC. According to a semi-canon source, Tion was the squire of Prince Aegon_V_Targaryen during the conflict.

name: Tion Tarbeck
bio: Tion Tarbeck, nicknamed the Red, was a member of House Tarbeck. He was the son of Lord Walderan_Tarbeck by his third wife, Lady Ellyn_Reyne. According to a semi-canon source, Ellyn Reyne named her son after the late Tion_Lannister, Ellyn's first husband, as an attack against Gerold_Lannister, Lord of Casterly Rock. Tion Tarbeck died in the collapse of Tarbeck Hall, during Tywin_Lannister's suppression of Houses Reyne and Tarbeck.

name: Titus Peake
bio: Titus Peake is the Lord of Starpike and the head of House Peake. He is married to Lady Margot_Lannister.

name: Titus Peake (son of Unwin)
bio: Titus Peake was a knight from House Peake and the heir to Starpike, Dunstonbury, and Whitegrove during the civil war known as the Dance of the Dragons. Titus was one of Lord Unwin_Peake's seven children, being his third son. He was the only one of Unwin's sons to grow to manhood. After the Battle of the Honeywine, Titus was knighted by Ser Jon_Roxton for his valor, but Ser Titus died only six days later in a meaningless skirmish with a band of broken men he stumbled upon whilst scouting. His sister, Myrielle_Peake, was the only sibling to outlive him.

name: Tobbot
bio: Tobbot is a man-at-arms in service to Ser Gregor_Clegane.

name: Tobho Mott
bio: Tobho Mott is a Qohorik master armorer in King's Landing. His shop is at the top of the Street of Steel in the capital. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tobho is portrayed by Andrew Wilde. Tobho learned to smith in Qohor. Ser Loras_Tyrell and Lord Renly_Baratheon are among the high lords who have purchased armor from Tobho. To intimidate his opponents and their horses in tourneys, Thoros_of_Myr dips his sword of cheap steel in wildfire and sets it ablaze. Since the wildfire ruins the blade, Thoros buys a new one from Tobho after each competition, with the two of them always arguing about the price. Tobho told Gendry, one of his apprentices, that Thoros could outdrink King Robert_I_Baratheon, and the armorer taught Gendry to be polite toward highborn girls.

name: Todder
bio: Todder, nicknamed Toad by his peers, is a recruit of the Night's Watch. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Todder is portrayed by Will O'Connell. Todder learned bawdy drinking songs in the winesink owned by his father.

name: Todric
bio: Todric is a fat ironborn raider.

name: Toefinger
bio: Toefinger is a wildling raider. Toefinger was once chased up a tree by a moose.

name: Togarion Bar Emmon
bio: Togarion Bar Emmon, known as Togarion the Terrible, was an Andal warlord of House Bar Emmon during the Andal invasion. During the Andal invasion, Togarion the Terrible established a small kingdom of his own north of the Blackwater Bay. However, he soon found himself hard-pressed by the Darklyn king of Duskendale. Across the bay, Qarlton_III_Durrandon, the Storm King, reconquered Massey's Hook following four generations of war, having slain the Hook's last king Josua_Massey. Sensing weakness to the south, Togarion wed Josua Softspear's daughter and crossed Blackwater Bay with all his power to establish a new kingdom on the Hook. He built his own castle of Sharp Point at the Hook's end, whilst driving the stormlanders from Stonedance and installing his wife's brother as a puppet lord. While Torgarion the Terrible was the first Andal warlord to invade the Kingdom of the Storm, others soon followed that brought graver concerns to Qarlton III than the reloss of Massey's Hook. In time, the Storm Kings would reconquer Togarion's small kingdom, and Sharp Point and Stonedance became vassals of Storm's End.

name: Togg Joth
bio: Togg Joth is a member of the Brave Companions. He is Ibbenese.

name: Togosh
bio: Togosh is a pit fighter in Meereen.

name: Tom of Sevenstreams
bio: Tom of Sevenstreams, also known as Tom o' Sevens or Tom Sevenstrings, is a singer and a member of the brotherhood without banners. Tom comes from Sevenstreams in the northern riverlands. He claims to have fathered at least seven sons long ago and claims they all have beautiful voices. One of his sons supposedly resides at the Peach in Stoney Sept, though Tom does not claim him. House Tully has never been good to Tom. Tom once ran afoul of Edmure_Tully when he stole a girl that Edmure was supposed to bed to take his virginity. Edmure had drunk too much and was unable to perform. Tom then made a song about a floppy fish, which led to Edmure's hatred of music. Edmure's sister, Lady Lysa_Arryn, once sent Tom up the high road, where the Vale mountain clans took his gold, horse, and clothes. He walked up to the Bloody Gate with nothing but his harp. There the guards made him sing "The Name Day Boy" and "The King Without Courage" before letting him pass. Tom sang at the wedding of his cousin, Ser Pate_of_the_Blue_Fork, to Amerei_Frey, though his cousin never paid him. Tom once seduced Lady Ravella Smallwood with the song, "Let Me Drink Your Beauty".

name: Spotted Tom
bio: Tom, dubbed Spotted Tom the Butcher, was the captain of a sellsword company in the Disputed Lands who became one of the infamous Band of Nine, the instigators of the War of the Ninepenny Kings. The Band of Nine were a group of merchants, sellswords and pirates who joined together to carve kingdoms out for themselves.

name: Tom the Strummer
bio: Tom the Strummer, known as the Bard of Flea Bottom, was a knight and singer during the reign of King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen. In 49 AC the young king Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen still had five vacant spots in the Kingsguard to fill. At the Golden Wedding, his mother Alyssa_Velaryon suggested the remaining five slots by a test of arms since knights from all over the realms had come to attend the wedding. Jaehaerys agreed, but with a twist - the knights must fight on foot, not the joust, for foes seldom strike a king from horseback. The wild melees and bloody duels that followed were dubbed by maesters as the War for the White Cloaks with hundreds of knights competing for the honor of serving in the Kingsguard. Although he did not win a white cloak, Tom the Strummer became a great favorite of the smallfolk, mocking his opponents before each bout with ribald songs. When Jaehaerys came of age, he had the City Watch of King's Landing comb Flea Bottom to find Tom the Strummer, so the king could make him the court singer.

name: TomToo
bio: Tom, known as TomToo, is the son of Tomard, one of the House Stark guards at Winterfell.

name: Tom Barleycorn
bio: Tom Barleycorn is a ranger of the Night's Watch at Castle Black. He shares a surname with Russ_Barleycorn, a fellow member of the Night's Watch.

name: Tom Codd
bio: Tom Codd, known as Bloodless Tom, is the captain of the ship Lamentation in the Iron Fleet. He is under the command of Victarion_Greyjoy.

name: Tom Costayne
bio: Tom Costayne, better known as Long Tom Costayne, was a knight from House Costayne who became a member of the Kingsguard at an unknown time. Ser Tom became known as 'Long Tom' while serving in the Kingsguard for sixty years. He may have been Tommen_Costayne_(knight), a knight who participated in the tourney at Ashford Meadow. In this case, he would have been appointed to the white cloaks after 209 AC and died before Ser Harlan_Grandison in 281 AC.

name: Tom Flowers
bio: Tom Flowers, known as the Bastard of Bitterbridge, was a bastard from House Caswell of Bitterbridge. Tom fought for the blacks and Rhaenyra_Targaryen in the civil war known as the Dance of the Dragons. During the Battle on the Honeywine, the Bastard of Bitterbridge and Lord Thaddeus_Rowan led a great host of mounted knights from the northeast, bearing down on the green army of Lord Ormund_Hightower. With another army cutting off Hightower's retreat, a victory for the blacks seemed imminent until Prince Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_I) arrived on his dragon, Tessarion, turning the tide of battle. By day's end, Tom was dead and burned amongst the reeds of the Honeywine.

name: Tom Tanglebeard
bio: Tom Tanglebeard was a man from Dragonstone.  His son was Tom_Tangletongue, and his nephew was Ser Marston_Waters. Tom and his son were referred to collectively as the "Two Toms". The Two Toms aided Ser Alfred_Broome during the fall of Dragonstone. The Two Toms accompanied King Aegon_II_Targaryen when he sailed to King's Landing. Tom Tanglebeard was later killed in the purge of the king's loyalists. Agents of the conspirators found him on a tavern of Eel Alley and drowned him in a cask of ale when he argued he was a simple fisherman looking for ale.

name: Tom Tangletongue
bio: Tom Tangletongue was a inhabitant of Dragonstone during the Dance of the Dragons. His father was Tom_Tanglebeard, and his cousin was Ser Marston_Waters. Tom and his father were referred to collectively as the "Two Toms". Tom learned about the death of the Grey Ghost from Volantenes. He and his father aided Ser Alfred_Broome during the fall of Dragonstone. After Ser Marston_Waters saved Lady Baela_Targaryen from Alfred, Tom took her to Dragonstone's maester. Tom was killed during the purge of Aegon II's loyalists following the green defeat at the Battle of the Kingsroad. He was surprised in the castle yards as he left the stables and promptly beheaded.

name: Tom Tidewood
bio: Tom Tidewood is an ironborn raider in Victarion_Greyjoy's crew.

name: Tom Turnip
bio: Tom Turnip was a royal jester and fool at court in the Red Keep during the late reign of King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen. Tom Turnip was a fool in the court of King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen and his sister-wife, Queen Alysanne_Targaryen. Their daughter, Princess Saera_Targaryen, often played cruel pranks on Tom, such as once telling him it would amuse the court if he performed naked at a great feast, but his actions were poorly received. On another occasion, Saera told Tom that if he climbed the Iron Throne he would become king, but the fool sliced his arms and legs to pieces when he attempted to do so. In 84 AC, Ser Braxton_Beesbury, Jonah_Mooton and Lord Roy_Connington were found drunk at the Blue Pearl, a brothel in King's Landing, laughing as Tom  was surrounded by six whores. When the drunk lordlings were questioned by gold cloaks, Red Roy admitted they thought it would be funny to see the fool do the deed, and Jonah admitted it was Princess Saera's idea. When brought before King Jaehaerys, the lordlings confessed to bringing Tom to the brothel but remained quiet about Saera's involvement. Saera's activities with the three men were uncovered, however, after Alysanne spoke with Perianne_Moore and Alys_Turnberry.

name: Toman
bio: Toman is a maester of the Citadel. He serves House Toland at Ghost Hill.

name: Tomard
bio: Tomard, better known as Fat Tom, is a guard sworn to House Stark. He has a son, TomToo. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tomard is portrayed by Phil Dixon. When Mance_Rayder visited Winterfell with Lord_Commander_Qorgyle, Robb_Stark and Jon_Snow dropped a mountain of snow on Tomard from a gate. Tom chased the youths around until all three were red-faced. Fat Tom gave Arya_Stark the nickname "Arya Underfoot".

name: Tomarro
bio: Tomarro is from Braavos. He is one of the regulars at the Gate.

name: Tommard Heddle
bio: Tommard Heddle, known as Black Tom, was a knight from the Heddle family. He was the son-in-law of Lord Ambrose_Butterwell of Whitewalls.

name: Tommen Baratheon
bio: Prince Tommen Baratheon is known to the Seven Kingdoms as the youngest child of King Robert_I_Baratheon and Queen Cersei_Lannister.  A member of House Baratheon of King's Landing, his siblings are Prince Joffrey_Baratheon and Princess Myrcella_Baratheon. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tommen is played by Callum Wharry (Seasons 1 and 2) and by Dean-Charles Chapman (Seasons 4 - 6). Lord Eddard_Stark last saw Prince Tommen when the boy was still breastfeeding. Tommen once adopted a fawn as a pet, but his elder brother, Prince Joffrey_Baratheon, later killed and skinned the animal. It is also implied Joffrey bullies and abuses Tommen physically or emotionally. Following the tourney on Prince Joffrey's name day, Tommen and his siblings traveled with Cersei_Lannister to Casterly Rock with their grandfather, Lord Tywin_Lannister.

name: Tommen Costayne
bio: Tommen Costayne is the Lord of the Three Towers and the head of House Costayne in the Reach.

name: Tommen Costayne (knight)
bio: Tommen Costayne was a knight of House Costayne during the reign of King Daeron_II_Targaryen. Tommen participated in the tourney at Ashford Meadow in 209 AC. He may have been Tom_Costayne, a knight of the Kingsguard in an unknown period. In this case, he would have been appointed to the white cloaks after 209 AC and died before Ser Harlan_Grandison in 281 AC.

name: Tommen I Lannister
bio: Tommen I Lannister was a King of the Rock of House Lannister of Casterly Rock. Tommen built a great fleet and brought Fair Isle into the Kingdom of the Rock, taking the daughter of the last Farman king to wife.

name: Tommen II Lannister
bio: Tommen II Lannister, known as the Lion King, was a King of the Rock of House Lannister living during the Century of Blood. King Tommen II sailed with his great fleet to Valyria after the Doom with the intention of plundering the wealth and sorcery he was sure still remained. It was a quest from which he never returned. The Valyrian steel greatsword Brightroar was lost with him. The last report of him is a Volantene chronicle titled The Glory of Volantis which mentions a "golden fleet" bearing the "Lion King" stayed at Volantis for supplies, and the that triarchs showered him with gifts. According to the chronicle, Tommen II swore that half of all he would find would be given to the triarchs in return for their generosity and the promise to send their fleet to his aid when he requested it. Afterward he sailed away. The next year, the chronicle states that Triarch Marqelo_Tagaros dispatched a squadron toward Valyria to find any sign of Tommen's golden fleet but returned empty handed.

name: Tommen Tully
bio: Tommen Tully was the Lord of Riverrun and the head of House Tully during the reign of the Storm King Arrec_Durrandon's rule over the riverlands. When the riverlands were invaded by Harwyn_Hoare, King of the Iron Islands, Tommen's natural son, Ser Samwell_Rivers, was slain at the Tumblestone. Lord Tommen abandoned Riverrun without a fight and fled with all his strength to join the host assembled at Raventree Hall under Lady Agnes_Blackwood. Resistance, however, proved futile and the riverlands fell to King Harwyn.

name: Topaz Emperor
bio: The Topaz Emperor was the legendary sixth ruler of the mythic Great Empire of the Dawn. He succeeded the Onyx_Emperor and was in turn succeeded by the Opal_Emperor.

name: Torbert
bio: Torbert is a septon of the Faith of the Seven in King's Landing. He is one of the Most Devout.

name: Toregg the Tall
bio: Toregg, called Toregg the Tall and Tall Toregg, is the eldest son of Tormund.

name: Torgen Oakheart
bio: Torgen Oakheart was the Lord of Old Oak and the head of House Oakheart during the reign of King Maegor_I_Targaryen and the beginning of the reign of King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen. In 48 AC, Lord Torgen and Lord Rickard_Rowan marched with Septon Moon_(septon) against the increasingly brutal King Maegor_I_Targaryen, defending the septon and his followers when they camped beneath the walls of Oldtown. After the death of Maegor the Cruel, Moon continued to denounce the Targaryens and the High Septon. Lord Donnel_Hightower refused to take up arms against Moon's followers, with many claiming the real reason was not wishing to offer battle to Lords Oakheart and Rowan. However, the lords were reluctant to offer their armies to the septon when he planned to attack Oldtown itself, with Torgen decamping a day after Rickard. Moon was later assassinated with the guards, ending his uprising. Torgen attended the Golden Wedding in 49 AC, where King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen entertained lords in the intimacy of his solar, encouraging them to speak freely and share their views on the problems of the Seven Kingdoms and how they might best be overcome. Lord Oakheart thought the king was grim. In 58 AC, Torgen was present in King's Landing to celebrate the tenth anniversary of Jaehaerys coming to the Iron Throne.

name: Torghen Flint
bio: Torghen Flint, known as Old Flint and the Flint, is clan chief of the First Flints, one of the northern mountain clans. He is the father of Donnel_Flint and Artos_Flint, each by a different woman. Torghen hates the Weeper for blinding girls, and raping, stealing, or slaying three of his clan.

name: Torgold Tollett
bio: Torgold Tollett, called Torgold the Grim, was an Andal warrior from House Tollett that lived during the Andal invasion. He was one of the many Andal warriors that gathered round Ser Artys Arryn and fought under his leadership at the Battle of Seven Stars. According to accounts, though bleeding from a score of wounds, he fought through Lord Redfort's strongest warriors and look the lord's arm with a single cut. He also slew Ursula_Upcliff, barehandedly tearing her head off. He was slain by King Robar_II_Royce. King Robar slashed at his head with Lady Forlorn. Tollett grabbed for the blade, laughing, but the sword sliced through his hands and buried itself in his skull. According to song he died choking on his last laugh.

name: Torgon the Terrible
bio: Torgon the Terrible is a legendary ironborn raider from the Age of Heroes.

name: Torgon Greyiron
bio: Torgon Greyiron, also known as Torgon the Latecomer, was a High King of the Iron Islands from House Greyiron during the Age of Heroes. Torgon was the eldest son of King Urragon_III_Greyiron. When his father died, Torgon had been away raiding along the Mander from his stronghold in Greyshield. His brothers sent him no word of the kingsmoot, hoping that one of them would be chosen. However, Urrathon_IV_Goodbrother was chosen instead and he had all of Torgon's brothers killed. When Torgon returned he denounced the kingsmoot as unlawful and revolted against Urrathon, with the aid of priests, lords and Urrathon's own captains. Although he was not chosen in a kingsmoot, Torgon ruled for forty years. He ruled fairly, but the Cape of Eagles was lost to House Mallister during his reign. Torgon was succeeded by his son, Urragon_IV_Greyiron, who also became king without a kingsmoot.

name: Torman Peake
bio: Torman Peake is a sellsword in service to the Golden Company. He is one of the brothers of the exiled Lord Laswell_Peake. Torman and his brothers are related to the Peakes of Starpike.

name: Tormo Fregar
bio: Tormo Fregar is a Braavosi noble of House Fregar.

name: Tormund
bio: Tormund, often called Tormund Giantsbane or Tormund Thunderfist, is a famous free folk raider from Ruddy Hall. He has four sons, Toregg, Torwynd, Dryn, and Dormund, and one daughter, Munda. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tormund is portrayed by Kristofer Hivju. Although Tormund is said to have slain a giant, he claims to have actually cut open the belly of a sleeping giantess and slept in her for warmth during a winter storm. Tormund claims the giantess, thinking he was a babe, then suckled him for three months in the spring. Tormund also claims to once have drunkenly slept with a bear. Tormund once thought to make himself King-Beyond-the-Wall, but he was defeated by Mance_Rayder.

name: Toron Greyjoy
bio: Toron Greyjoy was the Lord of the Iron Islands, Lord Reaper of Pyke, and the head of House Greyjoy during the reign of King Aegon_III_Targaryen. Toron was born a salt son of Lord Dalton_Greyjoy, the Red Kraken. Born in 127 AC, Dalton had just claimed his first four salt wives earlier that year. Toron resided with his mother on Pyke. In 133 AC, Dalton was killed by one of his salt wives, Tess, at Faircastle. As he had not taken a rock wife, the Seastone Chair passed to Toron by law. A power struggle was inevitable, however, as Toron was not yet six and his salt wife mother could not hope to act as a regent as a rock wife could. Lord Toron was seized by his aunts and their husbands, and his mother was put to death. Meanwhile, his father's cousins and the lords of Harlaw and Blacktyde raised up his half-brother Rodrik_Greyjoy_(son_of_Dalton), while another pretender rose up in the form of Sam_Salt, supposedly descended from the black line. The bloody struggle had raged for half a year when Lady Johanna_Lannister and Ser Leo_Costayne's forces invaded the Iron Islands in 134 AC in retribution for the Red Kraken's invasion of the westerlands. Lord Toron's defenders beat off the Lannister assault on Pyke, and thus he remained upon the Seastone Chair. However, two of his aunts had died in the conflict, and his brother Rodrik was taken and brought back to Casterly Rock, where he was gelded and made a fool.

name: Torrek
bio: Torrek is a member of the Stone Crows, one of the Vale mountain clans found in the Mountains of the Moon.

name: Torren Liddle
bio: Torren Liddle, called the Liddle, is the clan chief of House Liddle, a mountain clan in the North. He is the father of Duncan_Liddle, Morgan_Liddle and Rickard_Liddle.

name: Torrence Teague
bio: Torrence Teague was an adventurer of uncertain birth who was the eventual victor in the century-long conflict that arose in the riverlands after the death of King Bernarr_II_Justman. He was the founder of House Teague of the riverlands. Having seized a fortune in gold in an attack upon the westerlands, he used this wealth to bring large numbers of sellswords from across the Narrow Sea. After six years of war, Torrence was crowned King of the Trident at Maidenpool. However, he was so little loved he was forced to keep sons and daughters of the riverlords as hostages to ensure their loyalty.

name: Torreo Haen
bio: Torreo Haen was a Lysene magister who briefly became First Magister of Lys. In 133 AC, Torreo sent his daughter Myrmadora_Haen to King's Landing to be presented to King Aegon_III_Targaryen at the Maiden's Day Ball. After the fall of the Rogare family in 135 AC, a bloody struggle ensued in the resulting power vacuum. Torreo was elevated to first magister, but was poisoned with his wife, mistress, daughters (including Myrmadora), siblings, and supporters at the feast he held to celebrate his new position.

name: Torrhen Karstark
bio: Torrhen Karstark, affectionately called Torr by his sister Alys_Karstark, is the youngest son of Lord Rickard_Karstark of Karhold. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Torrhen is portrayed by Tyrone McElhennon.

name: Torrhen Manderly
bio: Torrhen Manderly was a knight from House Manderly during the Dance of the Dragons and the second son of Lord Desmond Manderly. He later became the Lord of White Harbor, as well as Lord Regent and Hand of the King during the minority of King Aegon_III_Targaryen. In the television adaptation House of the Dragon, Torrhen is portrayed by Dan Fogler.

name: Torrhen Stark
bio: Torrhen Stark, known as the King Who Knelt, was a head of House Stark who reigned as King in the North until Aegon_I_Targaryen invaded Westeros with his dragons. He was named Lord of Winterfell and Warden of the North after submitting to Aegon during the Conquest.

name: Torrhen Stark (son of Edric)
bio: Torrhen Stark was a member of House Stark. He was the elder brother of his twin Cregard_Stark, and the eldest son of Edric_Stark_(son_of_Cregan) and Serena_Stark.[N 1]

name: Torwold Browntooth
bio: Torwold Browntooth is an ironborn raider.

name: Torwyn Greyjoy
bio: Torwyn Greyjoy was a Lord of the Iron Islands and head of House Greyjoy. According to Archmaester Haereg's History of the Ironborn, Torwyn swore a blood oath with Ser Aegor_Rivers, but Lord Greyjoy betrayed Bittersteel to his enemies during one of the Blackfyre Rebellions.[N 1]

name: Torwynd
bio: Torwynd, known as Torwynd the Tame, is a son of Tormund.

name: Tothmure
bio: Tothmure is a maester of the Citadel at Harrenhal.

name: Tourmaline Emperor
bio: The Tourmaline Emperor was the legendary fourth ruler of the mythic Great Empire of the Dawn. He succeeded the Jade_Emperor and was in turn succeeded by the Onyx_Emperor.

name: Trebor Jordayne
bio: Trebor Jordayne is the Lord of the Tor and the head of House Jordayne in Dorne. His daughter Myria_Jordayne is his heir.

name: Tregar
bio: Tregar is the captain of the guards sworn to House Lannister in King's Landing.

name: Tregar Ormollen
bio: Tregar Ormollen is a merchant prince of Lys. He shares his manse with the exiled Lynesse_Hightower, who became his chief concubine after leaving her husband, Ser Jorah_Mormont. A native of Lys, Tregar is a wealthy merchant prince with a wife and several concubines. In 293 AC, Ser Jorah_Mormont and his wife, Lynesse_Hightower, arrived in Lys, seeking an escape from Jorah's crimes in Westeros. In order to keep up with his wife's demands of wealth and luxury, Jorah sold his service as a sellsword. However, while Jorah was fighting the Braavosi on the Rhoyne, Lynesse met Tregar. Soon, he had taken her as one of his concubines and moved her into his manse. When Jorah returned to Lys, Tregar informed him that he would be enslaved for his debts, unless he gave up Lynesse and left Lys. Heartbroken, Jorah went to Volantis. As Tregar's chief concubine, it is rumored that even his wife goes in fear of Lynesse.

name: Tremond Gargalen
bio: Tremond Gargalen is the Lord of Salt Shore and the head of House Gargalen.

name: Trianna
bio: Trianna was a triarch of the Free City of Volantis who lived at the end of the Century of Blood. Trianna was returned four times to the office of triarch, but no woman has been elected since. She was one of the members of the elephant party that brought down tiger rule ending the old wars of the Century of Blood.

name: Tristan Mudd
bio: Tristan Mudd was a member of House Mudd who became Lord Commander of the Night's Watch. He is considered one of the worst commanders the Night's Watch has ever had.

name: Tristan Rivers
bio: Tristan Rivers is a Westerosi sellsword in service to the Golden Company. He is a bastard. Tristan is an exiled bastard, knight, and outlaw from the riverlands.

name: Tristan Ryger
bio: Tristan Ryger is a member of House Ryger.

name: Tristan Vance
bio: Tristan Vance was the Lord of Wayfarer's Rest and the head of House Vance of Wayfarer's Rest during the Dance of the Dragons. At the start of the Dance of the Dragons in 129 AC, Tristan was among the prominent riverlords that supported Queen Rhaenyra_Targaryen and the blacks, despite initial reluctance. At the Battle of the Red Fork, Tristan and Lord Petyr_Piper met the host of Lord Jason_Lannister. Despite being out numbered, the rivermen pushed the westermen back thrice and mortally wounded Lord Lannister. On the fourth push, Ser Adrian_Tarbeck and a hundred knights swam upstream and circled back to take Tristan's lines from the rear. The rivermen's host shattered and Lord Vance was slain by Ser Adrian. Tristan was succeeded as the Lord of Wayfarer's Rest by the young Hugo_Vance_(lord).

name: Tristifer Botley
bio: Tristifer Botley, known as Tris, is the second son of Lord Sawane_Botley of Lordsport. Tristifer was among the five boys brought to Pyke to become the foster sons of Lady Alannys_Harlaw after Greyjoy's Rebellion. Theon_Greyjoy knew him since they were boys. Tris became friends with Asha_Greyjoy, but he was sent away to Blacktyde after he and Asha were found touching each other by Maester Qalen. Tris wrote letters to Asha from Blacktyde, but Maester Joseran refused to send them.

name: Tristifer IV Mudd
bio: Tristifer IV Mudd, also known as the Hammer of Justice, was the fourth King of the Rivers and the Hills to bear that name. A monarch of the First Men from House Mudd, his crypt lies among the ruins of Oldstones. Tristifer ruled from the Trident to the Neck in the era when the First Men were being attacked and overrun in the Andal invasion. He raised the castle that became known as Oldstones, the strongest in Westeros at the time of its construction. Tristifer was the last truly great king of the First Men in the Riverlands. When Roland_II_Arryn, the King of Mountain and Vale, invaded the riverlands, Tristifer smashed his forces and forced the Valemen into retreat. One of Roland's allies then betrayed him to the river king, and Tristifer beheaded Roland at Oldstones. Tristifer is said to have fought one hundred battles, winning ninety-nine and losing one. The Tullys fought alongside him in many of his campaigns. The one battle Tristifer lost was his last, where seven Andal kings attacked simultaneously; the greatest of the conquerors was Armistead_Vance. Tristifer was succeeded by his son, Tristifer_V_Mudd, the last of House Mudd.

name: Tristifer V Mudd
bio: Tristifer V Mudd, also known as Tristifer the Last, was the fifth King of the Rivers and the Hills to bear that name. A monarch of the First Men from House Mudd, and with him his royal line became extinct. Tristifer V became king when his father, Tristifer_IV_Mudd, was slain in battle. He was not the equal of his very capable father and soon the kingdom was overrun and the line extinguished.

name: Tristifer Wayn
bio: Tristifer Wayn was a Lord of House Wayn during the Faith Militant uprising. During the Faith Militant uprising, Lord Tristifer took up arms on behalf of the High_Septon_(Aenys_I) and the Starry Sept against the Iron Throne. He fought in the battle at the Great Fork alongside Lord Rupert_Falwell and other knights from the Westerlands and Riverlands, as well as hundreds of Poor Fellows, against the royal army led by King Maegor_I_Targaryen himself. It is unknown if he survived.

name: Tristimun
bio: Tristimun was a knight who commanded the sea watch during the reign of King Aerys_II_Targaryen. Smugglers were executed whenever they were caught by old Tristimun and his sea watch.

name: Triston of Tally Hill
bio: Triston of Tally Hill is a knight in service to House Sunglass. He is from Tally Hill.

name: Triston Farwynd
bio: Triston Farwynd is the Lord of Sealskin Point and the head of House Farwynd.

name: Triston Hightower
bio: Triston Hightower was a head of House Hightower and Lord of the Hightower. Triston was the son of Lord Damon_Hightower, who died when Triston was newly born. Triston was raised and trained by Septon Robeson, who ruled in all but name for twenty years and ultimately became the first High Septon. Lord Triston raised the Starry Sept in Robeson's honor after his passing. Triston was succeeded by his son Barris_Hightower.

name: Triston Massey
bio: Triston Massey was the Lord of Stonedance and the head of House Massey during the War of Conquest. When Aegon_I_Targaryen prepared to begin his conquest of Westeros, he summoned his friends and bannermen to attend to him on Dragonstone, Lord Massey among them. Despite being sworn to House Durrandon of Storm's End, Triston had closer ties to House Targaryen. After Aegon was crowned as King of All Westeros, he created the first small council and Lord Triston had the honor of becoming master of laws.

name: Triston Sunderland
bio: Triston Sunderland is the Lord of the Three Sisters and the head of House Sunderland.

name: Black Trombo
bio: Black Trombo was a Myrish sellsword in the service of House Vance of Wayfarer's Rest during the Dance of the Dragons. Black Trombo was a mummer before he became a sellsword. During the Dance of the Dragons, Black Trombo led a company of Myrish sellswords hired by Lord Hugo_Vance_(lord). Trombo arranged the ambush of Ser Criston_Cole's outriders at Crossed Elms, during which blacks disguised as corpses killed a dozen greens. This led to Cole's dwindling and exhausted army being destroyed at the Butcher's Ball - though it is unclear if Trombo was present at this final assault. Black Trombo's sellswords from Myr accompanied three hundred Wayfarer's Rest men led by Lord Hugo to the host of Ser Addam_Velaryon. The Myrish claimed that he slew Prince Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_I) during the Second Battle of Tumbleton by smashing Daeron's face in with a swing of his spiked morningstar. Black Trombo survived the battle, but his fate after that has not been stated: afterwards the river lords' army advanced on King's Landing culminating in the Battle of the Kingsroad, the last battle of the war, but Trombo is not mentioned during these events.

name: Trystane Martell
bio: Prince Trystane Nymeros Martell, better known simply as Trystane Martell, is the youngest child of the ruling Prince of Dorne, Doran_Martell, and his wife, Lady Mellario of Norvos. He is affectionately called Trys by his older sister Arianne_Martell. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Trystane is portrayed by Toby Sebastian. Born in 287 AC, Trystane was the youngest child of his father, Prince Doran_Martell, and mother, Lady Mellario of Norvos. At the age of four, Trystane suffered from redspots. While he was still young, his mother left Dorne and returned to Norvos, the city of her birth.

name: Trystane Truefyre
bio: Trystane, later called Trystane Truefyre, was a squire to Ser Perkin_the_Flea, a hedge knight, during the Dance of the Dragons. During the riot of King's Landing, Trystane was crowned king by Ser Perkin_the_Flea, who claimed Trystane was the natural son of King Viserys_I_Targaryen. Ser Perkin began knighting every man who flocked to Trystane's banner, including sellswords and thieves, amassing a force of hundreds of "gutter knights". The River Gate became the first place were Trystane's banner flew above the battlements, after the "Mudfoot" garrison of the gold cloaks went over to Trystane and slew their captain and three serjeants. After Queen Rhaenyra_Targaryen fled King's Landing, Ser Perkin seized the Red Keep and installed Trystane on the Iron Throne, before the eyes of Grand Maester Orwyle, Lord Corlys_Velaryon and Dowager Queen Alicent_Hightower. Lord Larys_Strong, the master of whisperers for Aegon_II_Targaryen, emerged from hiding and took a place of honor at the side of the new "king", who styled himself Trystane Truefyre. Trystane began to issue royal decrees from atop Aegon's High Hill, repealing the unpopular taxes of Lord Bartimos_Celtigar and dividing the coin of the royal treasury among his own followers. He followed with a general cancellation of debt and raised threescore of Perkin's gutter knights to nobility. In response to rival "King" Gaemon_Palehair's decree of free bread and beer for the starving, "King" Trystane granted the poor the right to take rabbits, hares and deer from the kingswood - though not elk or boar. Meanwhile, Ser Perkin recruited scores of surviving gold cloaks, taking control of the Dragon Gate, the King's Gate, and the Lion Gate - in total four of the seven gates of the capital and more than half the towers along the city's walls. After the death of Rhaenyra, when Lord Borros_Baratheon's army reached the Blackwater Rush, Trystane followed the Clubfoot's advice and sent him to parley under a flag of truce along with Grand Maester Orwyle and Queen Alicent. An accord was reached between the two sides, in which Ser Perkin and his gutter knights would be pardoned of all crimes, but not the pretender Trystane. Thus, when Borros reached the Red Keep, he found Trystane's ragged banners hauled and the pretender arrested. He was put in a dungeon and would be joined by the two other false "Kings", Gaemon Palehair and the Shepherd, to await the return of King Aegon II for judgment. According to Mushroom, Trystane was at first defiant when he was dragged before King Aegon II, but seeing Ser Perkin standing beside the king took the heart from him. He did not plead innocence nor beg for mercy, asking only that he be made a knight before he died. Aegon granted that boon and Ser Marston_Waters dubbed him Ser Trystane Fyre - as the name "Truefyre" was deemed presumptuous - and then Ser Alfred_Broome beheaded him with Blackfyre.

name: Tuffleberry
bio: Tuffleberry is a servant at Harrenhal who takes care of the brewhouse.

name: Lord Tully (father of Hoster)
bio: Lord Tully was the Lord of Riverrun and the head of House Tully during the early reign of King Aerys_II_Targaryen. He became the head of his house after the death of the Lord_Tully_(successor_of_Medgar).[N 1] When he passed away, he was sent down the Red Fork in a boat following the Tully funeral customs. The boat was set aflame by his eldest son, Hoster_Tully, who fired a fire arrow. Hoster missed his first shot but his second arrow found the sail.

name: Lord Tully (successor of Medgar)
bio: Lord Tully was the Lord of Riverrun and the head of House Tully during the reign of King Aerys_I_Targaryen. Lord Tully became the head of his house after the death of Lord Medgar_Tully when he was still a boy. At the start of his rule, the boy lord was surrounded by women. This period saw the renewal of the ancestral feud between the Blackwoods of Raventree Hall and the Brackens of Stone Hedge. Since Lord_Bracken_(father_of_Otho) was dying and his belligerent second son, Ser Otho_Bracken was set to inherit, tensions grew. The fact that Otho had killed Lord Quentyn_Blackwood in a tourney a few years back and earned the nickname of the "Brute of Bracken" only worsen the situation. Septon Sefton_Staunton speculated their young liege lord would do little to inforce a peace between the bitter neighbors. He was invited to the wedding of his bannerman, Lord Ambrose_Butterwell of Whitewalls, to a Lady_Frey_(wife_of_Ambrose_Butterwell) of Lord_Frey of the Twins, but did not attend it. The guests toasted him at the wedding feast. He was eventually succeeded as Lord of Riverrun and Lord Paramount of the Trident by the Lord_Tully_(father_of_Hoster).[N 2]

name: Tumberjon
bio: Tumberjon is a ranger of the Night's Watch.

name: Tumco Lho
bio: Tumco Lho, nicknamed Tum, is a former slave in Meereen training to become a knight. Tumco is originally from the Basilisk Isles. He was training in the fighting pits of Meereen when Daenerys_Targaryen took the city and freed the slaves from their chains.

name: Turnip
bio: Turnip is a scullion and the child of Gage, the head cook at Winterfell.

name: Turquin
bio: Turquin is a maester at the Citadel.

name: Two female puppeteers
bio: The two female puppeteers are women of King's Landing that end up in the Red Keep's black cells, used by Qyburn for his experiments.

name: Two-headed girl
bio: A two-headed girl from Mantarys is a slave owned by Yezzan_zo_Qaggaz. She is a part of Yezzan's grotesquerie, one of Yezzan's "special treasures".

name: Two Swords (sellsword)
bio: Two Swords is a sellsword in service to the Golden Company. His given name is unknown.

name: Ty
bio: Ty is a steward to the Night's Watch at Castle Black.

name: Tya Lannister
bio: Tya Lannister was a noblewoman from House Lannister. Tya was married to Gowen_Baratheon, the third son of a reigning Lord of Storm's End. Their wedding, circa 208 AC, was the last between houses Lannister and Baratheon until the marriage of King Robert_I_Baratheon and Queen Cersei_Lannister some seventy-six years later.[N 1] Tya and Gowen had one son, a "large and lusty lad" born with a full head of black hair, who died in his infancy.

name: Tyana Wylde
bio: Tyana Wylde was a noblewoman from House Wylde. She was the wife of Ser Aenys_Frey, with whom she had two sons, Aegon and Rhaegar_Frey.

name: Tyanna of the Tower
bio: Queen Tyanna of the Tower, also known as Tyanna of Pentos, was a courtesan from Pentos who married King Maegor_I_Targaryen, becoming the third of his six wives. Tyanna was rumored to be the natural daughter of a magister of Pentos. She began as a tavern dancer and rose to become a courtesan, although some claimed she was also a poisoner and a sorceress. Prince Maegor_I_Targaryen was exiled to Pentos in 39 AC, but he returned to the Seven Kingdoms to claim the Iron Throne in 42 AC amid the Faith Militant uprising. His rule was challenged with a trial of seven; Maegor won but was left grievously wounded. Twenty-eight days later, Alys_Harroway, Maegor's second wife, returned to Westeros in the company of Tyanna; the Pentoshi woman was rumored to be Maegor's concubine or Alys's paramour. The Dowager Queen, Visenya_Targaryen, after meeting with Tyanna, gave the king over to her care alone, which troubled Maegor's supporters. After awakening from his coma, Maegor burned the Warrior's Sons at the Sept of Remembrance atop the Hill of Rhaenys and waged war on the Faith Militant. After his victory in the battle at the Great Fork of the Blackwater, Maegor returned to King's Landing and announced his intention to take Tyanna as his third wife. When Grand Maester Myros objected, claiming that the king's only true wife was Ceryse_Hightower, Maegor slew the man with his Valyrian steel sword, Blackfyre. Tyanna married Maegor atop the Hill of Rhaenys, and Alys is said to have joined the pair in bed on their first night of marriage. Tyanna served as mistress of whisperers on her husband's small council and was dubbed "the king's raven". It was said that discussing secrets in the Red Keep was foolish, as rats and other vermin were her spies. The Dowager Queen also died in 44 AC. In the confusion after Visenya's death, Aenys_I_Targaryen's widow, Queen Alyssa_Velaryon, slipped away from Dragonstone with her children, as well as with the sword Dark Sister. Alyssa and Aenys's second son, Prince Viserys_Targaryen_(son_of_Aenys_I), had been kept at the Red Keep as Maegor's squire, however, and he suffered for her flight. Viserys died after nine days of questioning at the hands of Tyanna of the Tower. When Queen Alys gave birth to a monstrosity in 44 AC, Queen Tyanna convinced Maegor that it was due to Alys having secret affairs. Maegor disbelieved Tyanna and called her a barren, jealous witch, whereupon Tyanna provided the king with a list of twenty men she claimed had slept with Alys. This led to the extinction of House Harroway, and the torture and execution of dozens of alleged lovers. Tyanna tortured Alys herself for near a fortnight until the queen died. Tyanna was unable to give Maegor an heir, so the king wed the three Black Brides—Elinor_Costayne, Jeyne_Westerling_(wife_of_Maegor_I), and Rhaena_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aenys_I)—in 47 AC. Tyanna forced Rhaena's obedience by threatening her daughters, Aerea_Targaryen and Rhaella_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aegon). Some stories claim that Tyanna gave Jeyne a fertility potion that night, but the new bride tossed it into Tyanna's face. In 48 AC, Queen Jeyne birthed a stillborn monstrosity, and rumors spread that Maegor was cursed. The angry king had two of his Kingsguard, Ser Owen_Bush and Ser Maladon_Moore, bring Tyanna to the dungeons. As the torturers prepared their tools, she confessed her responsibility for the two abominations born of Alys Harroway and Jeyne Westerling, claiming she had poisoned the babies in their mothers' wombs. Tyanna also promised that the same fate would befall the pregnant Elinor Costayne. Tyanna was killed by Maegor's own hand, her heart cut out with Blackfyre and thrown to his dogs; Maladon stood witness to her death. Two moons later Elinor birthed a stillborn monstrosity. After Maegor died on the Iron Throne in 48 AC, his headsman, gaolers, and confessors were condemned by King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen for having aided Tyanna in the death of his elder brother, Prince Viserys.

name: Tybald
bio: Tybald is a maester of the Citadel in service to the Dreadfort.

name: Tybero Istarion
bio: Tybero Istarion, better known as Inkpots, is the paymaster of the Second Sons, a mercenary company.

name: Tybolt Crakehall
bio: Tybolt Crakehall is a knight of House Crakehall. He is the eldest son and heir of Lord Roland Crakehall.

name: Tybolt Hetherspoon
bio: Tybolt Hetherspoon is a landed knight and the head of House Hetherspoon. He had a daughter, Melara_Hetherspoon, who drowned in a well when she was young.

name: Tybolt Lannister
bio: Tybolt Lannister was Lord of Casterly Rock and head of House Lannister. He was the eldest son and heir of Lord Damon_Lannister_(lord). He had a younger brother, Gerold_Lannister, who was his advisor.

name: Tybolt Lannister (king)
bio: Tybolt Lannister, dubbed the Thunderbolt, was a King of the Rock of House Lannister of Casterly Rock. Tybolt defeated the first Andal warlords to march into the westerlands.

name: Tycho Nestoris
bio: Tycho Nestoris is a representative of the Iron Bank of Braavos. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tycho is portrayed by Mark Gatiss.

name: Tyene Sand
bio: Tyene Sand is the bastard daughter of Prince Oberyn_Martell and an unnamed septa. She is one of the infamous Sand Snakes. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tyene is portrayed by Rosabell Laurenti Sellers. When Tyene was in the cradle her mother, a septa, read to her from The Seven-Pointed Star. Tyene spent her youth at the Water Gardens with her cousin, Princess Arianne_Martell, as well as with Sylva_Santagar, Andrey_Dalt, and Garin_(orphan). Tyene and Arianne grew as close as sisters, learning to read, ride, and dance together. They have shared meals, jewelry, beds, and onetime a flagon of wine stolen by Arianne. The two would have lost their virginity together to Andrey as well, but he was premature in Tyene's hands during the encounter. Arianne once crossed the Mander with three of the Sand Snakes to visit Tyene's mother. Tyene and Arianne once fled Sunspear to try to marry Arianne to Willas_Tyrell at Highgarden, but they were caught by Tyene's father, Oberyn_Martell, at Vaith. Oberyn also once brought Tyene with Arianne and Sarella_Sand to Shandystone, where he showed Tyene how to milk vipers for their venom. Doran_Martell, Prince of Dorne, kept a marriage pact hidden from Arianne because he feared his daughter would not have kept it a secret from Tyene, who would then have informed her sisters, Obara_Sand and Nymeria_Sand.

name: Tygett Lannister
bio: Tygett Lannister, called Tyg by his family, was a knight from House Lannister. Born as the fourth of Lord Tytos_Lannister's children by Lady Jeyne_Marbrand, Tygett was the third of four brothers. Tyg always felt he was living in the shadow of his eldest brother, Tywin_Lannister, with whom he always had a difficult relationship. Tygett fought in the War of the Ninepenny Kings in 260 AC, killing a man during his first battle and three more later in the war, including a knight of the Golden Company. Although Tywin and Kevan_Lannister earned knighthoods from the war, ten-year-old Tygett was too young to earn his spurs. His courage and skill was remarked upon, however. According to a semi-canon source, Tygett served as a squire when Tywin suppressed the revolt of Houses Tarbeck and Reyne in 261 AC. Tygett was eventually knighted. At sixteen, Tygett visited the Free Cities on his coming of age tour. By 270 AC, King Aerys_II_Targaryen had come to disregard Tywin, his Hand of the King. When Tywin tried to name Tygett as the master-at-arms at the Red Keep, the king instead chose Ser Willem_Darry. Tygett and his younger brother Gerion_Lannister were unhorsed by Prince Rhaegar_Targaryen during the tournament in honor of Viserys's birth at Lannisport in 276 AC. When young Tyrion_Lannister asked for a dragon as a present for his nameday, Tygett upset his nephew by explaining that dragons died out a century before. Tygett was married to Darlessa_Marbrand, with whom he had one son, Tyrek_Lannister. Tygett eventually died of a pox.

name: Tyland Lannister
bio: Tyland Lannister, later called the Hooded Hand, was a knight from House Lannister. He served on the small council at King's Landing, as master of ships for Viserys_I_Targaryen, as master of coin for Aegon_II_Targaryen, and as Hand of the King for Aegon_III_Targaryen. He was the younger twin brother of Jason_Lannister, the Lord of Casterly Rock. In the television adaptation House of the Dragon, Tyland is portrayed by Jefferson Hall. The younger twin brother of Jason_Lannister, Tyland was a second son denied the glory of a lordship, leaving him to find his own place in the world. When Princess Rhaenyra_Targaryen visited the westerlands in 112 AC, Tyland and Jason vied for the hand of the princess during a feast at Casterly Rock. Both the twins showered her with gifts without success. Eventually, Tyland was appointed master of ships and lord admiral by King Viserys_I_Targaryen, sitting as one of the youngest members of the small council alongside Lord Larys_Strong.

name: Tyler Hill
bio: Tyler Hill was a knight in the service of House Lannister and a bastard son of Lord Lyman_Lannister of Casterly Rock. So as to support Prince Aegon_Targaryen_(son_of_Aenys_I) in his fight against King Maegor_I_Targaryen without openly declaring House Lannister for either side, Lord Lyman_Lannister provided Aegon with five hundred Lannisport men led by Tyler. Unlike Aegon, the bastard survived the Battle Beneath the Gods Eye but received scars during the fighting. The widowed Queen Rhaena_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Aenys_I) and her third husband, Androw_Farman, briefly stayed at Casterly Rock with the Lannisters after being forced to leave Faircastle by Lord Franklyn_Farman. Tyler attempted to woo Rhaena and was hostile toward Androw.

name: Tyler Norcross
bio: Tyler Norcross was a knight and the head[N 2] of House Norcross during the civil war known as the Dance of the Dragons. At the start of the Dance of the Dragons, Tyler Norcross declared for King Aegon_II_Targaryen and the greens. Like the rest of the supporters of the greens from the Reach, he joined the host of Lord Ormund_Hightower on his march to King's Landing. After the First Battle of Tumbleton and the death of Lord Ormund, the army was paralyzed in the city without a clear commander and without knowing with certainty the intentions of the Two Betrayers, Hugh_Hammer and Ulf_White. One night, Tyler and twelve other lords and landed knights of the Reach assembled at an inn, the Bloody Caltrops, to conspire against Hugh and Ulf. During the discussions, Tyler expressed he wanted to use Prince Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_I)'s dragon, Tessarion, to retake the capital. The Second Battle of Tumbleton broke out before the Caltrops could carry out their plans, however. Tyler and most of his companions died during the battle.[N 1]

name: Tyler Teague
bio: Tyler Teague was one of the last monarchs of House Teague. He was the youngest son of Humfrey_I_Teague, who caused a massive uprising of Riverlords by attempting to suppress worship of the old gods. In the campaign's final battle, Humfrey I perished, and the crown passed to Tyler's eldest brother, who became Humfrey_II_Teague. However, Humfrey II was also killed, whereupon Hollis_Teague, Tyler's second eldest brother, picked up the crown, only to be killed in turn. Thus Tyler became the King of the Rivers and the Hills, but also died, inheriting the crown to his uncle Damon_Teague, who was also killed. By the end of the day, House Teague was extinct.

name: Tymond Lannister
bio: Tymond Lannister was the Lord of Casterly Rock and the head of House Lannister during the late reign of King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen. In 80 AC, Ser Tymond was the son and heir of the Lord of Casterly Rock. Queen Alysanne_Targaryen raised the possibility of Tymond as a suitor to her daughter, Princess Daella_Targaryen_(daughter_of_Jaehaerys_I). He was the richest among the possible contenders and closest in age to the princess, but the princess was dissuaded by his personality. Daella eventually married Lord Rodrik_Arryn. By 101 AC, Ser Tymond had inherited from his father. That year, he attended the Great Council at Harrenhal with a retinue of three hundred bannermen, men-at-arms, and servants. However, he was outdone by Lord Matthos_Tyrell of Highgarden, who counted five hundred in his retinue. Lord Tymond supported the claim of Viserys Targaryen, a choice that would be remembered and rewarded when the prince ascended the Iron Throne as King Viserys_I_Targaryen.

name: Tymor
bio: Tymor is an ironborn raider sworn to House Greyjoy. He has two[N 1] brothers who are also raiders.

name: Tyrek Lannister
bio: Tyrek Lannister is a member of House Lannister. He is the son of Ser Tygett_Lannister and Lady Darlessa_Marbrand.

name: Tyrion Lannister
bio: Tyrion Lannister is a member of House Lannister and is the third and youngest child of Lord Tywin_Lannister and the late Lady Joanna_Lannister. His older siblings are Cersei_Lannister, the queen of King Robert_I_Baratheon, and Ser Jaime_Lannister, a knight of Robert's Kingsguard. Tyrion is a dwarf; because of this he is sometimes called the Imp and the Halfman. He is one of the major POV characters in the books. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tyrion is portrayed by Peter Dinklage. As a young boy, Tyrion had committed to learn all sixteen of the wonders described by Lomas_Longstrider to memory, and occasionally recited them during feasts. For years, he dreamed that one day he could travel the world and see them himself. In 289 AC, when he became a man at sixteen, he wanted to take a tour of the nine Free Cities, as his uncles Gerion_Lannister and Tygett_Lannister had done. Tywin forbade him to go, claiming he was irresponsible because of his marriage to Tysha, and instead gave him charge of all the cisterns and drains at Casterly Rock. When Tyrion was eighteen, in 291 AC,[N 4] his uncle Gerion left on a journey for Valyria to recover the ancient Valyrian steel greatsword Brightroar which had once belonged to House Lannister. Lord Tywin forbade Tyrion to go on this journey as well. For his twenty-third name day, Tyrion received a mare from his brother Jaime. He keeps a suit of plate armor crafted for his atypical body at Casterly Rock.

name: Tyrion II Lannister
bio: Tyrion II Lannister, called the Tormentor, was a King of the Rock of House Lannister of Casterly Rock. Though strong and famed for his prowess with the battle-axe, Tyrion II was known for his delight in torture, and it was whispered of him he desired no woman unless he first made her bleed.

name: Tyrion III Lannister
bio: Tyrion III Lannister was a King of the Rock from House Lannister of Casterly Rock. As the Andals began moving into the westerlands in larger numbers than in the time of Tybolt_Lannister_(king), Tyrion decided to arrange marriages for the more powerful Andal warchiefs with the daughters of the great local Houses. Aware of Andal betrayals in the Vale, he also took the sons and daughters of the new Andal lords as wards and fosterlings to serve as pages and cupbearers, as well as hostages, at Casterly Rock. He was succeeded by his son, Gerold_II_Lannister, who continued Tyrion's policies.

name: Tyrion Tanner
bio: Tyrion Tanner[N 1] is the bastard son of Lollys_Stokeworth and an unknown father. He is named after Tyrion_Lannister.

name: Tyroshi sellsword
bio: A Tyroshi sellsword commands the freeriders of Ser Forley_Prester within the Lannister host led by Ser Jaime_Lannister during the early stages of the War of the Five Kings. The mercenary comes from Tyrosh, and his given name is unknown. Tyrion_Lannister learned some of the tongue of Tyrosh from a sellsword at Casterly Rock, who may have been this sellsword.

name: Tysane Frey
bio: Tysane Frey is a noblewoman of House Frey, the eldest daughter of Lothar_Frey and Leonella_Lefford.

name: Tysha
bio: Tysha was a peasant girl of the westerlands, and the first wife of Tyrion_Lannister. Tysha was a crofter's daughter, orphaned when her father died of an illness. When Tyrion_Lannister was thirteen years old, he was traveling with his brother, Ser Jaime_Lannister, on the road between Lannisport and Casterly Rock, and found Tysha being accosted by some outlaws. Jaime chased down the men, while Tyrion took care of Tysha. He took her to a nearby inn and fed her; they drank wine and talked, and soon they were making love. Tysha cried when he took her maidenhead, but afterwards kissed him and sang "The Seasons of My Love". Tyrion fell in love with Tysha, and they were married by a drunken septon, with pigs as witnesses. They lived in a little cottage by the sunset sea, and spent whole days in bed. They would kiss and make love, and Tysha would sing for him. A fortnight later, the septon confessed to Lord Tywin_Lannister, Tyrion's father. Incensed at a common woman daring to marry a Lannister, Tywin ordered Jaime to tell Tyrion that Tysha was a maiden whore who Jaime had paid to make Tyrion a man, even arranging the incident with the outlaws to set the scene. Tywin then had Tysha gang-raped by his guards in their barracks; each guard gave her a silver coin. To drive the lesson home, Tywin forced his son to be the last man to rape her, for whom Tysha was paid a gold coin, because Lannisters were worth more. Afterwards, Tywin had the marriage undone, and the septons said it was as if Tyrion and Tysha had never been wed.

name: Tyshara Lannister
bio: Tyshara Lannister was a member of House Lannister during the reign of King Aegon_III_Targaryen. Tyshara was a daughter of Lord Jason_Lannister and his wife, Lady Johanna_Lannister. She had four sisters, including Cerelle_Lannister_(daughter_of_Jason), and one brother, Lord Loreon. After the death of Queen Jaehaera_Targaryen in 133 AC, Lady Johanna set aside her war with the ironmen long enough to write to Lord Unwin_Peake, the Hand of the King, that her daughters Tyshara and Cerelle were maidens of noble birth and marriageable age. Not long after the Maiden's Day Ball was announced, Tyshara was found abed with a groom. Tyshara claimed that the groom had climbed through her window, but Grand Maester Munkun's examination found her maidenhead to be broken. However, it is still likely that the groom was planted, as it was heavily rumored that the King's Hand set out to ruin various maidens to promote his Myrielle_Peake as Aegon III's second queen. Moreover, it is quite common for highborn ladies to lose their maidenheads while horseback riding.

name: Tyta Frey
bio: Tyta Frey, better known as Tyta the Maid is the fourth daughter of Lord Walder_Frey, the second daughter born of his marriage to Alyssa_Blackwood. She is supposedly still a maid.

name: Tytos Blackwood
bio: Tytos Blackwood is the Lord of Raventree Hall and the head of House Blackwood in the riverlands. Tytos and Lord Jonos_Bracken once visited Riverrun to lay their quarrel before Hoster_Tully, Lord Paramount of the Trident.

name: Tytos Brax
bio: Tytos Brax is a knight of House Brax. He is the eldest son of Lord Andros_Brax and the heir to Hornvale.

name: Tytos Frey
bio: Tytos Frey is a knight from House Frey and is the eldest son of Ser Jared_Frey and Alys_Frey. He is married to Zhoe_Blanetree and has two children; Zia_Frey and Zachery_Frey.

name: Tytos Lannister
bio: Tytos Lannister was the Lord of Casterly Rock and the head of House Lannister during the reigns of kings Aegon_V_Targaryen, Jaehaerys_II_Targaryen, and Aerys_II_Targaryen. He is the grandfather of Cersei_Lannister, Jaime_Lannister and Tyrion_Lannister by his eldest son, Tywin_Lannister. According to a semi-canon source, Tytos was a squire in his youth but was never knighted. He loved watching tourneys, but never participated in one. Tytos was the third-born son of Lord Gerold_Lannister and Lady Rohanne_Webber. His elder twin brothers were Tywald_Lannister and Tion_Lannister; Tywald was slain in the Peake Uprising in 233 AC. Tytos married Jeyne_Marbrand at Casterly Rock in 235 AC and had five children with her. Tytos became the heir of Casterly Rock in 236 AC, after the death of Tion at the Battle of Wendwater Bridge during the Fourth Blackfyre Rebellion. According to Maester Beldon, Ellyn_Reyne, widowed after the death of Tion, tried to seduce the new heir, Tytos, so he would set aside Jeyne for Ellyn. Tytos apparently was so intimidated by Ellyn that he failed to perform, and in shame confessed to Jeyne, who forgave him but not her good-sister, Ellyn. Jeyne informed her good-father, Lord Gerold, who hastily wed Ellyn to his elderly bannerman, Lord Walderan_Tarbeck. Gerold took firm control of the westerlands and was determined to do everything he could to prepare his unpromising new heir for lordship. Gerold was not blind to his son's flaws though and knew Tytos would be unsuitable for the positions of Lord of Casterly Rock and Warden of the West. While his son and heir, Ser Tywin_Lannister, was named Hand of the King by the newly-crowned King Aerys_II_Targaryen in 262 AC, Tytos remained at Casterly Rock, though after the destruction of the Reynes and Tarbecks by his heir, none of his remaining vassals caused further trouble. One autumn, Tytos came between a lioness and her prey. The lioness tore into Tytos's horse and was about to attack him as well, when Clegane_(founder) came to his rescue with his dogs, losing his leg and three dogs in the process. Out of gratitude, Tytos gave the kennelmaster lands and a towerhouse and took Clegane_(father_of_Gregor_and_Sandor) as a squire, thereby creating House Clegane. In his last few years, Tytos became very fat and took Tytos_Lannister's_second_mistress, a commonborn daughter of a candlemaker. She helped herself to the late Jeyne_Marbrand's jewels and clothes and also began ordering about household knights, dismissed servants, and sat in attendance at court when Tytos was absent. While Tywin was in King's Landing In 267 AC, Tytos died of a heart attack while climbing stairs to see his mistress. When Tywin returned to Casterly Rock to take the lordship, he ordered a walk of atonement through Lannisport for his father's mistress. The only influence Tytos had on his son was that Tywin mistrusted laughter and that he became a hard man. Tytos did not forget his children when he died, and left behind a generous inheritance for Tywin, Kevan_Lannister, Genna_Lannister, Tygett_Lannister, and Gerion_Lannister.

name: Tytos Lannister's first mistress
bio: Tytos Lannister's first mistress was a lowborn woman who served as a wet nurse for House Lannister. Her name is unknown. Lady Jeyne_Marbrand died not long after giving birth to Gerion_Lannister in 255 AC. During the War of the Ninepenny Kings in 260 AC, Lord Tytos_Lannister remained at Casterly Rock with his mistress, Gerion's young wet nurse. Tytos often retreated to her comforts rather than deal with ruling the westerlands. By 267 AC, the wet nurse had been replaced by Tytos_Lannister's_second_mistress.

name: Tytos Lannister's second mistress
bio: Tytos Lannister's second mistress was a lowborn woman, the daughter of a candlemaker. Her name is unknown. Lady Jeyne_Marbrand, the wife of Tytos_Lannister, Lord of Casterly Rock, died not long after giving birth to Gerion_Lannister in 255 AC. Gerion's wet nurse became Tytos's Tytos_Lannister's_first_mistress. However, the wet nurse was eventually replaced with the comely daughter of a candlemaker. Tytos began seating his second mistress beside him in the hall, and showering her with gifts and honors, even asking her views on matters of rule in the westerlands. The mistress helped herself to the jewels and clothes of Tytos's deceased wife, Jeyne. She also began ordering about household knights, dismissed servants, and sat in attendance when Tytos was absent. In 267 AC, Lord Tytos died of a heart attack while climbing stairs to see his mistress. Abandoned by her allies at court, the mistress lost all of her gifts from Tytos. Lord Tywin_Lannister had her stripped naked and paraded her through the streets of Lannisport for a fortnight, where she was forced to confess to every man she met that she was a thief and a harlot. At the end of the two weeks, she was sent into exile from the docks.

name: Tywald Lannister
bio: Tywald Lannister was a knight from House Lannister, the eldest son and heir of Lord Gerold_Lannister and Lady Rohanne_Webber, the twin of Tion_Lannister and elder brother of Tytos_Lannister and Jason_Lannister_(son_of_Gerold). Tywald was the eldest son of Gerold_Lannister, Lord of Casterly Rock, and Lady Rohanne_Webber, his second wife. In his youth, Tywald was betrothed to Ellyn_Reyne and was a squire to her father, Lord Robert_Reyne of Castamere. During the Peake Uprising in 233 AC, Tywald fought on the side of King Maekar_I_Targaryen, but he was mortally wounded by a spear at Starpike. Prince Aegon_V_Targaryen knighted the squire, while Tywald laid dying in his twin brother Tion_Lannister arms. According to a semi-canon source, Tywald asked his brother to "take care of Lady Ellyn" with his final words. This later led Lord Gerold to agree to a betrothal between Tion and Ellyn.

name: Tywell II Lannister
bio: Tywell II Lannister was a King of the Rock of House Lannister of Casterly Rock. Tywell was identified by some as the Andal king in the tale of the Rat_Cook.

name: Tywin Frey
bio: Tywin Frey, affectionately called Ty by his Genna_Lannister, is a member of House Frey and is the eldest son of Ser Cleos_Frey and Jeyne_Darry.

name: Tywin Frey
bio: Tywin Frey is the fourth son of Ser Raymund_Frey and Beony_Beesbury, the twin of Jaime_Frey.

name: Tywin Lannister
bio: Tywin Lannister is Lord of Casterly Rock, Shield of Lannisport, and Warden of the West. The head of House Lannister, Tywin is one of the most powerful lords in Westeros, and he is the father of Queen Cersei_Lannister, Ser Jaime_Lannister of the Kingsguard, and Tyrion_Lannister. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tywin is portrayed by Charles Dance. Tywin was the first born of Tytos_Lannister and Jeyne_Marbrand. According to legend, the baby bit the finger of his grandsire, Lord Gerold_Lannister. Lord Tytos agreed to marry his daughter Genna_Lannister to Emmon_Frey, the second son of Lord Walder_Frey, just to please the Lord of the Crossing. The betrothal was announced at a feast in 252 AC, with most of the western lords in attendance. Upon the announcement, Lord Roger_Reyne left the hall in anger and Ellyn_Reyne laughed aloud. Only the ten-year-old Tywin spoke out against the wedding because he thought it an uneven match. Shortly after that incident, Tytos sent Tywin to King's Landing to serve as a royal page and cupbearer at King Aegon_V_Targaryen's court, where Tywin befriended the young Prince Aerys_II_Targaryen and Steffon_Baratheon, the heir to Storm's End. His cousin, Joanna_Lannister, also served at the royal court as a companion and lady-in-waiting to Princess Rhaella_Targaryen since 259 AC. During the War of the Ninepenny Kings in 260 AC, eleven thousand westermen under the leadership Tywin's uncle, Ser Jason_Lannister_(son_of_Gerold), were sent to fight beside other forces of the Iron Throne in the Stepstones. Tywin, who was already a knight, joined the Lannister force, as did his brothers Kevan_Lannister and Tygett_Lannister as squires. The young Prince Aerys served as a squire during the war and when he won his knighthood, Tywin was granted the honor of knighting his friend. After Robert's Rebellion, Lord Tywin returned to Casterly Rock, where he continued to serve as Warden of the West. At the wedding of Robert I Baratheon and Cersei Lannister, the new king appointed Ser Ilyn_Payne as the King's Justice as a gift for Tywin. When Tywin discovered his son Tyrion_Lannister had wed a common girl, Tysha, which in Tywin's eyes would make House Lannister a laughingstock again, Tywin taught him a sharp lesson. He commanded Tyrion's older brother, Ser Jaime_Lannister, to name Tysha a prostitute and made Tyrion watch as Tywin gave her over to his garrison, having each man pay the girl a silver coin after raping her. He forced Tyrion to do the same but pay Tysha a gold coin. Tywin earned the enmity of his son forever for that act, but Tywin did not care, for it was on his other children that he placed all his hopes. When Tyrion was turning sixteen, Tywin refused to allow him to travel and see the world as Tywin's brothers had in their youth, fearing Tyrion would bring further shame on House Lannister. Tywin instead put his son in charge of the drains and cisterns of Casterly Rock. In 289 AC, Balon_Greyjoy, Lord of the Iron Islands, began Greyjoy's Rebellion against King Robert_I_Baratheon through the burning of the Lannister fleet anchored at Lannisport. After the defeat of the Greyjoys, Tywin rebuilt the Lannister fleet and hosted another tourney at Lannisport. Tywin sent men in search of Gerion_Lannister after his brother disappeared, but the Laughing Lion was not found. Due to Robert's financial mismanagement of the realm, as well as his own new connection to the throne by marriage, Lord Tywin frequently lent money to the crown, placing the court in King's Landing in debt of over three million gold dragons to House Lannister. Tywin was unsuccessful in three attempts to purchase Valyrian steel longswords from impoverished lesser houses. Tywin hosted a tourney in 295 AC, and he brought a retinue to King's Landing for the tourney on Prince Joffrey's name day in 298 AC.

name: Uhlan
bio: Uhlan is a sellsword and serjeant of the Second Sons.

name: Ulf
bio: Ulf, known as Ulf son of Umar after Umar, is a member of the Moon Brothers, one of the Vale mountain clans found in the Mountains of the Moon.

name: Ulf the Ill
bio: Ulf the Ill is an ironborn raider.

name: Ulf White
bio: Ulf White, also known as Ulf the White and Ulf the Sot, was a dragonseed who became a dragonrider during the Dance of the Dragons. In the television adaptation House of the Dragon, Ulf is portrayed by Tom Bennett. A dragonseed of Dragonstone, Ulf the White was a man-at-arms when the Dance of the Dragons began. When Prince Jacaerys_Velaryon called for dragonriders in 129 AC, Ulf was able to mount Silverwing. Ulf and his fellow dragonseeds—Hugh_Hammer, Nettles, and Addam_Velaryon—fought valiantly besides Jacaerys in the Battle of the Gullet, but Jace fell during the battle. The dragonrider began to call himself "Ulf White". After the fall of King's Landing, Prince Daemon_Targaryen suggested that Ulf be wed to the daughter of the late Lord Stokeworth, but Rhaenyra declined. The queen instead granted knighthood to Ulf and Hugh and granted them lands on Driftmark. According to Mushroom, a drunken Ulf rode through Flea Bottom wearing only golden spurs. When Daemon suggested that Houses Baratheon and Lannister should be destroyed for their support of King Aegon_II_Targaryen, he proposed granting Storm's End to Ulf, but after Lord Corlys_Velaryon opposed the idea, Rhaenyra refused the suggestion. In 130 AC, Ulf White and Hugh Hammer were sent to help the blacks defend the town of Tumbleton from Lord Ormund_Hightower's approaching host. During the First Battle of Tumbleton, however, the Two Betrayers defected to the greens. Prince Daeron_Targaryen_(son_of_Viserys_I) named Ulf as Lord of Bitterbridge, but Ulf desired to receive Highgarden as his seat, not considering Bitterbridge to be sufficient. According to Mushroom, Ulf raped three maidens each night and fed those who displeased him to his dragon, Silverwing. Ulf took the Bawdy Badger as his favored inn. The Caltrops conspired to kill both Ulf and Hugh Hammer. Lord Unwin_Peake had warrants for their executions drawn up, which were signed by Prince Daeron. The day that the Caltrops planned to strike, however, the Second Battle of Tumbleton took place. Ulf survived the battle, drunkenly sleeping through every attempt to wake him. When he learned that Hugh had died during the battle, Ulf informed Lord Peake that he was going to claim the Iron Throne. The next day, Ser Hobert_Hightower brought Ulf two casks of wine, one Dornish red and one Arbor gold. As Ulf preferred the sweeter vintage, the Arbor gold had been poisoned. Suspicious of Hobert's behavior, Ulf commanded the Dornish red to be set aside, and only dared drink from the poisoned Arbor gold after he had seen Hobert drink from it himself. After Hobert asked for a second cup, Ulf drank three cups himself, and soon fell asleep before dying peacefully due to the poison.

name: Uller
bio: Uller is an ironborn sailor sworn to Balon_Greyjoy.

name: Lord Uller (husband of Nymeria)
bio: Lord Uller was the Lord of Hellholt and the head of House Uller during Nymeria's War. He was Princess Nymeria's second husband. During Nymeria's War, Lord Uller supported Princess Nymeria and her husband Lord Mors_Martell against King Yorick_V_Yronwood and his bannermen. At some point after the death of Lord Martell at the Third Battle of the Boneway, Lord Uller married Nymeria and served her as a counselor and consort since Nymeria remained the unquestioned ruler of Dorne. Their marriage remained childless and Nymeria married Ser Davos_Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, after Uller's death.

name: Ulmer
bio: Ulmer of the Kingswood is an old ranger of the Night's Watch. He is an archer and a former member of the Kingswood Brotherhood. Ulmer was once a member of the Kingswood Brotherhood, outlaws active during the reign of King Aerys_II_Targaryen. Ulmer was trained by Fletcher_Dick, who he considers the finest archer who ever lived. Ulmer claims he once put an arrow through the hand of Ser Gerold_Hightower, Lord Commander of the Kingsguard, in order to steal a kiss from a Dornish princess (presumably Elia_Martell). He also stole her jewels and a chest of coins. Ulmer helped Wenda the White Fawn burn her mark in the buttocks of her highborn captives, such as Merrett_Frey. After the destruction of the Brotherhood by Ser Arthur_Dayne, Ulmer was sent to the Wall.

name: Ulrick Dayne
bio: Ulrick Dayne was a knight from House Dayne and a Sword of the Morning at some point prior to 211 AC. His exact era is unknown, however according to a semi-canon source, he was active somewhere in the days of Eustace_Osgrey.

name: Ulwyck Uller
bio: Ulwyck Uller is a knight from House Uller and the younger brother of Lord Harmen_Uller. He is the uncle of Ellaria_Sand, the paramour of Prince Oberyn_Martell. This makes him the granduncle of the four youngest Sand Snakes: Elia_Sand, Obella_Sand, Dorea_Sand and Loreza_Sand.

name: Umar
bio: Umar is the father of Ulf, a member of the Moon Brothers in the Vale of Arryn. It is unknown if Umar is still alive or not.

name: Umbert
bio: Umbert was an archmaester at the Citadel of Oldtown. He was known for his writings on the reign of King Jaehaerys_I_Targaryen, which he wrote a century after the Old King's reign.

name: Umfred
bio: Umfred is the steward for House Baelish at their tower.

name: Umma
bio: Umma is a cook in the House of Black and White in Braavos.

name: Ummet
bio: Ummet was the food taster for King Aegon_II_Targaryen. The same day King Aegon_II_Targaryen died, Ummet was murdered by men acting on Ser Perkin_the_Flea's orders. Mushroom claims to have seen Ummet's murder and was forced to hide in a barrel of flour to avoid sharing the same fate. Archmaester Gyldayn considers this only one of the fool's many untrusworthy stories. After the king's death, several names were brought up as the person who put the poison in the king's wine. Ummet as Aegon's own food taster was considered a likely candidate. Whilst the hand that poisoned Aegon's Arbor red will never be known, there is no doubt that it was done at the behest of Larys_Strong.

name: Unella
bio: Unella is a septa of the Faith of the Seven in service at the Great Sept of Baelor in King's Landing. She might be one of the Most Devout.[N 1] In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Unella is portrayed by Hannah Waddingham.

name: Unwin Peake
bio: Unwin Peake was the Lord of Starpike, Dunstonbury, Whitegrove, and the head of House Peake during the Dance of the Dragons. He later served as Lord Regent, Protector of the Realm, and Hand of the King during the regency of King Aegon_III_Targaryen. Amid the Lysene Spring in 135 AC, there was a conspiracy against House Rogare in King's Landing. It was claimed that the Rogares were plotting to assassinate King Aegon_III_Targaryen in order for his brother, Prince Viserys_II_Targaryen, who was married to Lady Larra_Rogare, to ascend the Iron Throne. This eventually led to the secret siege within the Red Keep. When the plot unraveled and the conspirators were arrested, many suspected Lord Unwin was the mastermind behind it, for all the conspirators were men and women he had named to positions of power when he was Hand of the King. Although it was never conclusively proven, few doubt Unwin was involved.

name: Urek Ironmaker
bio: Urek Ironmaker is a member of House Ironmaker. He is a grandson of Erik_Ironmaker.

name: Urho the Unwashed
bio: Urho the Unwashed is said to be the worst of  the pirates on Dagger Lake.

name: Urragon III Greyiron
bio: Urragon III Greyiron, known as Urragon the Bald, was a High King of the Iron Islands from House Greyiron. When Urragon III died, his younger sons hurriedly convened a kingsmoot whilst their elder brother Torgon_Greyiron was raiding up the Mander, convinced one of them would be chosen the High King. However, the captains and kings chose Urrathon_IV_Goodbrother of Old Wyk instead. Urrathon's first command was to put the sons of Urragon to death.

name: Urragon IV Greyiron
bio: Urragon IV Greyiron was a High King of the Iron Islands from House Greyiron. Urragon was called upon by his aged father Torgon_Greyiron to help him rule the Iron Islands in court and council, remaining at his father's side for the best part of five years during war and peace. When Torgon died, Urragon assumed kingship without a kingsmoot and no priest of the Drowned God denouncing him. Urragon's reign was long but undistinguished. His dying wish was for the high kingship to pass to his great-nephew, Urron_Greyiron, but the priests demanded that a kingsmoot be held to select the successor. During the choosing at Old Wyk, however, Urron Redhand had his axemen slaughter many of the attendees, and his line henceforth ruled hereditarily as Kings of the Iron Islands.

name: Urras Greyiron
bio: Urras Greyiron, known as Urras Ironfoot, was a High King of the Iron Islands from House Greyiron. The prophet Galon_Whitestaff summoned the numerous rock and salt kings to Old Wyk for a kingsmoot, during which Urras, the salt king of Orkmont, was chosen as the first High King of the Iron Islands. Urras was the first monarch to rule all ironborn since the Grey_King. After Ironfoot's death, the driftwood crown was claimed by his son, Erich_I_Greyiron. Galon forced Erich to step down under threat of death, however, since he had not been chosen in a kingsmoot. Regnar_Drumm was instead chosen in a new kingsmoot.

name: Urrathon IV Goodbrother
